note: Two stack currencies modeled as steady-state throughput. Restraint Chains: charged to 10 at battle start and refilled to 10 at each full-burst end after her own burst, then the S1 'specific timing' attack dumps all of them (one 50.06% hit per chain). Modeled as a 500.6% (10 x 50.06%) flatDamage dump at start (passive) and once per rotation (fullBurstEnd; she is the team's Burst III so full-burst end == her burst end). Ensnaring Chains: sustained-damage DoT that caps at 20 stacks (fed by the Restraint hits and by S2's +1-per-40-normals during full burst); modeled at the rebuild-aware average of ~10.8 stacks = 270.9%/s permanent DoT (her burst CANCELS Ensnaring to 0; it rebuilds +10 from the Restraint dump at the following FB end and +1 per 40 normals during FB windows, reaching the 20 cap just before her next burst -> time-weighted average ~10.8 between her bursts). Burst Dragging Chain mirrors the 20 Ensnaring stacks for 10s (1001%/s = 20 x 50.05%) and then CANCELS Ensnaring. Because the burst replaces Ensnaring rather than stacking with it, I decompose: the permanent 270.9%/s DoT is the always-on baseline, and the burst adds the DELTA 730.1%/s (1001 - 270.9) for 10s (she reliably re-reaches ~20 stacks by the time she bursts) -- so the DoT output during a burst window equals the correct 1001%/s, with no double-count (the naive '1001 on top of 501.6' would over-count ~195M). The parser missed the x20 stack mirror entirely (read only 50.05%/s). Validated vs the real scope-lock T3 sample: the old permanent-20-stack baseline read 1.19-1.51 hot; the rebuild-aware average lands 1.03. DoTs correctly inherit S2's stageEnter-3 sustainedDamagePct +59.98%/10s via the Damage-Up bucket. skill2 is left to the parser: its stageEnter-3 sustained-damage buff is parsed correctly, its 40-normals-in-FB Ensnaring generation is folded into the steady-state 20-stack cap, and its 'when incapacitated' (+20 Ensnaring) and 'when enemy neutralized' (+1 Restraint) blocks are inert (defensive / boss never dies). REFIT (2026-07-13): riders lost the universal range bonus -> rebuild average re-fit from 10.8 to 12 stacks (301.0%/s baseline, 700.0 burst delta), still within the kit-derived 10-12 window. [materialized 2026-07-16: skill2 auto-filled from the offline parser (blablalink prose) — behavior-identical to the prior runtime parse; NOT hand-verified]

skill2: Activates when the skill user is incapacitated. Affects targets in the Ensnaring Chains state.
Activates when an enemy is neutralized while in the Ensnaring Chains state. Affects self.
